overview: GPT-5.4 is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT (Flagship / Thinking) line. Released 2026-03-05. OpenAI's flagship reasoning model line for complex agentic coding, tool use, and professional work.
What's notable in this version: More affordable flagship; native Computer Use API, five-level reasoning effort, 1M+ context.
